description_long: This is a tall, rectangular lotion bottle with a pump dispenser on top, designed for easy one-handed use. The front face features the brand name 'Lady Lamduan' and the product name 'Cleansing Gel' in elegant, pink script, along with delicate floral line art in soft pink and white hues. The back side contains detailed product information and instructions in small text, while the sides are decorated with a subtle continuation of the floral pattern. The bottle is made of semi-opaque plastic, allowing a faint view of the contents inside, and the pump mechanism is white and cylindrical. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a gentle gradient from light pink to white, giving it a clean and feminine appearance.
description: A tall, rectangular lotion bottle with a white pump dispenser, pink floral graphics, and soft gradient coloring.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Lady Lamduan Cleansing Gel' label and floral graphics.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain side with faint floral patterns and no text.
description_view_2: Back view featuring detailed product information and instructions, plus floral graphics.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal graphics and no text, mirroring the other side.
